name: ai-team-skills
description: Enterprise-grade Multi-agent AI development team system for fullstack projects — project-aware, self-adapting, and continuous across sessions
author: ByRohat

skills.name: _core-protocols
skills.description: Shared operating system for every agent — the four cross-cutting protocols (Continuity, Adaptation, Self-Evolution, Clarification) + the brain contract. Not an agent persona; read once per session.

skills.name: product-owner
skills.description: Backlog grooming, user stories, Gherkin acceptance criteria, RICE scoring, OKR alignment, sprint planning

skills.name: team-lead
skills.description: Project coordination, sprint metrics, velocity tracking, risk matrix, ADR management

skills.name: tech-strategist
skills.description: Technology Decision Protocol — needs-based language/framework/architecture/stack selection (never popularity), decision matrix, alternatives, risks, draft ADR

skills.name: architecture
skills.description: System design, architectural patterns, C4 diagrams, ADR registry

skills.name: ux-designer
skills.description: Design systems, design tokens, wireframing, WCAG 2.2 accessibility, responsive design, design-dev handoff

skills.name: ai-engineer
skills.description: LLM integrations, prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, vector databases, multi-agent orchestration, LLMOps

skills.name: data-engineer
skills.description: ETL/ELT pipelines, dbt data modeling, Apache Kafka streaming, data quality, Airflow orchestration, data contracts

skills.name: backend
skills.description: API contracts, business logic, DB query optimization, OpenTelemetry

skills.name: frontend
skills.description: UI development, Core Web Vitals, accessibility WCAG 2.2, i18n, Zustand

skills.name: mobile-engineer
skills.description: iOS/Android/React Native/Flutter development, offline-first, push notifications, app store deployment

skills.name: devops
skills.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization, Kubernetes orchestration, Secrets management

skills.name: sre
skills.description: SLO/SLI/error budgets, incident management, chaos engineering, capacity planning, runbooks, toil reduction

skills.name: performance
skills.description: API latency, query profiling, caching strategy, load testing

skills.name: observability
skills.description: Structured JSON logging, OpenTelemetry tracing, Prometheus metrics, Grafana

skills.name: security
skills.description: OWASP 2024 audits, SAST/DAST scanner checks, threat modeling

skills.name: privacy
skills.description: GDPR/CCPA/KVKK regulations, PII encryption, DPIA audits

skills.name: qa
skills.description: Unit, integration, E2E, contract (Pact), chaos and mutation tests

skills.name: docs
skills.description: OpenAPI specs, Runbooks, Post-mortem documentation, Changelogs

commands.team-stack: Technology Decision Protocol — needs-based stack/language/architecture selection
commands.team-slo: Show SRE SLO dashboard and error budgets

protocols.autonomous_activation: Activate on the first message of every session WITHOUT being asked; then operate autonomously through the task queue, pausing only for the Clarification guardrails and never bypassing VETO/HOLD gates.
protocols.continuity: Read the brain (profile first) and reconstruct project state before acting; a fresh chat resumes seamlessly.
protocols.adaptation: Tailor every recommendation to the project's real stack/conventions/glossary in project-profile.json; detect & populate if empty.
protocols.self_evolution: Write learnings to the brain freely; propose skill-file changes in proposed-improvements.md and ask — never edit skills silently.
protocols.clarification: Ask the user when a wrong assumption is costly or irreversible; proceed with a stated assumption otherwise; never invent values.
